notes: 0 shared-signature: every form has a distinct named CST discriminator (read-axis).
0 carve-outs: all 36 kinds can have $variant removed post-rewrite (read-axis).
Read-axis (carve-out): injective = each form has a distinct named CST child. 0 non-injective.

Render-axis (partition): ROUTE-EXISTING = all form contents are bare symbol/alias refs (the form-group kind wraps everything; just flip dispatch to emitBranchTemplate, no construction). MUST-CONSTRUCT = form content is seq(shared_prefix, discriminating_middle, shared_suffix); needs buildBranchRenderRuleFromForms builder (the -32 zone).
These two axes are INDEPENDENT: a kind can be injective (no carve-out) AND must-construct (fused prefix/suffix). reference_expression is exactly this case.
range_pattern is MIXED: first form is a bare symbol; second and third are seqs. Treat as MUST-CONSTRUCT.
Native render path is BROKEN for all parent polymorph kinds (transport requires all form fields simultaneously).
Form-kind render (overridePassthrough forms) works via native path.
MUST-CONSTRUCT count: rust 13, typescript 5, python 1 = 20 kinds total (the -32 risk surface).
ROUTE-EXISTING count: rust 8, typescript 6, python 3 = 16 kinds (pure dispatch flip).

partitionTable.note: each form is $.array_expression_semi / $.array_expression_list
each form is seq(5 members) sharing _closure_expression_static_marker prefix
each form is a bare $.delim_token_tree_* symbol
each form is a bare $.expression_statement_* symbol
each form is seq(3 members) sharing _field_pattern_ref_marker prefix
each form is seq(3 members) sharing visibility_modifier prefix
each form is seq(4 members) sharing for_lifetimes prefix
each form is seq(7 members) sharing _unsafe_marker prefix
each form is seq(2 members) sharing '//' prefix
each form is seq(3 members) sharing 'macro_rules!' + name prefix
each form is seq(4 members) sharing match_pattern + guard prefix
each form is seq(4 members) sharing visibility_modifier + 'mod' + name prefix
each form is a bare $.or_pattern_* symbol
each form is seq(3 members) sharing '*' prefix; const/mut anonymous tokens are the discriminator
each form is a bare $.range_expression_* symbol
MIXED: prefix form is bare $.range_pattern_prefix; left_with_right and left_bare are seq(2 members). Treat as MUST-CONSTRUCT.

each form is seq(3 members): & + raw + reference_expression_raw_* + value. The -32 trap: shared '&' prefix and value suffix must be hoisted. NOT a carve-out (raw_const vs raw_mut are distinct named discriminators).
each form is seq(5 members) sharing visibility_modifier + 'struct' + name prefix
each form is a bare $.token_tree_* symbol
each form is a bare $.token_tree_pattern_* symbol
each form is a bare $.visibility_modifier_* symbol
each form is seq(3 members) sharing 'export' prefix; form-group CST kinds are hidden (_-prefixed)
each form is seq(2 members) sharing 'declare' prefix
each form is seq(4 members) sharing _async_marker prefix
each form is a bare $.call_expression_* symbol
each form is a bare $.class_heritage_* symbol
each form is a bare $.export_statement_* symbol
each form is a bare $.import_clause_* symbol
each form is seq(2 members) sharing _export_specifier_export_kind prefix
each form is seq(5 members) sharing '[' prefix
each form is seq(3 members) sharing '(' prefix
each form is a bare $.update_expression_* symbol
hidden kind; form content is bare $.match_block_block symbol
each form is seq(2 members) sharing _left_hand_side prefix
all forms are bare symbols: $.expression, $.expression_statement_tuple, $.assignment, $.augmented_assignment, $.yield
each form is a bare $.with_clause_* symbol
